summary: Phenomenal soundboard capture with ferocious Phil bass and an outstanding Sugaree performance.
review: The recording is praised as crystal‑clear and deep, delivering one of the most vivid captures of Phil Lesh’s rib‑rattling bass. The show itself shines with high energy, highlighted by a superb Sugaree and a cleanly rendered High Time, while Brent’s growing comfort on keyboards adds extra fire.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews are enthusiastic about both the musical performance and the audio fidelity; average reviewer stars are ~4.7, indicating an exceptional show with excellent soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Deep, rib‑rattling bass from Phil, crystal‑clear clarity on tracks like High Time, overall phenomenal and crisp soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic performance with strong band cohesion; no specific flow issues noted.

band_member_comments.Phil: Deep, rib‑rattling bass praised as ferocious and a highlight of the night.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s comfort on keyboards is highlighted as adding to the band’s energy.
